Main: Click on this icon to access the instructions on using the dashboard.
ES:
The attendance is calculated based on signing the attendance list
distributed during the ES.
PracticeTest: The grade of your highest attempt is displayed.
edXQuizzes:
The total average score is calculate as the average over all the quizzes
available on the edX platform in a particular week (including past ones).
The quizzes that are available but not completed are given the score of 0.
The distribution of quizzes across the Bloom's levels can be found in the Instructions.
edXES:
The total average score is calculated as the average
over all the online exercise sessions
available on the edX platform in a particular week.
If the bar is not displayed, the score is 0.
Merlin:
The graph represent the number of the models created in the Merlin online tool.
Only creating new models is tracked, updating the existing models is not tracked.
HA: This visualization displays your final HA grades.
